mapper.select: SELECT no,name,poster,type,phone,likecount,replycount FROM food ORDER BY no ASC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 12 ROWS ONLY
SELECT no,name,poster,type,phone,likecount,replycount FROM food WHERE ${column} LIKE '%'||#{fd}||'%' ORDER BY no ASC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 12 ROWS ONLY
SELECT CEIL(COUNT(*)/12.0) FROM food WHERE ${column} LIKE '%'||#{fd}||'%'
